meta.homeDescription: A directory of free tools and resources for gamers: pity and damage calculators, redeem codes, databases, rankings and price comparisons.
meta.toolsDescription: GGToolkit's full directory of free tools for gamers, organised by category: calculators, codes, databases, rankings and prices.
meta.guidesDescription: Practical guides to get the most out of your games: gacha pity, calculators, redeem codes and more.
meta.aboutDescription: What GGToolkit is: an ecosystem of free tools built for the gaming community.

home.intro: GGToolkit brings together our free tools and resources for players in one place: pity and damage calculators, verified redeem codes, databases, rankings and price comparisons. All fast, no sign-up, and built to help you play better.

about.body:
GGToolkit is an ecosystem of free tools and resources for the gaming community. We build calculators, databases and comparators that answer concrete player questions: how far you are from pity, how much damage your Pokémon deals, which codes are still active, or where to get resources without falling for scams.

All our tools are free, no sign-up and multilingual. This hub gathers them so you can find them easily and discover the ones you don't know yet.

Suggestions or bugs? Get in touch:

footer.disclaimer: GGToolkit is an independent project made by fans. Game trademarks belong to their respective owners.
